violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Multiple containers of food items not labeled or date marked.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Discard moldy Pyrex container of "?" in walk in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Small "home-made" shelf has exposed particle wood. Not properly sealed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Deli slicer and microwave are in need of cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units in walk in cooler and kitchen area have build-up of debris and need cleaning. Sheet tray storage rack needs cleaning.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean manner to protect from contamination. Multiple pots, pans, & catering equipment stored under shelving units and prep tables in kitchen.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Invert food service containers on top of shelving unit to protect from potential contamination.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean. Drain clogged with debris.--Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Pots & pans and catering equipment stored in front of hand sink.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Sausage casings hung from hand sink faucet. Catering dish stored in hand sink.
Receptacles for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Refuse receptacle in not covered when not in continuous use.

Removal frequency of refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Refuse, recyclables, and returnables were not removed from the premises at a frequency to minimize odors and conditions that attract insects and rodents. Garbage container in kitchen full and overflowing.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in kitchen area and walk in cooler.
